title: Clinical event dates cannot precede informed consent
description: An event cannot predate informed consent. For every clinical-event date on a non-ICF form (*STDAT, VSDAT, LBDAT, etc.): (1) emit an ICFDAT_CF fetch from the ICF form at the top of the survey per the 7L pattern; (2) extend each event-date field's existing constraint with `. >= ${ICFDAT_CF}` AND-joined with any other date rules. Constraint_message updated to reference the consent floor: 'Date must be on or after informed consent date and cannot be in the future.' Exception: dates ON the ICF form itself (ICFDAT, WITDRAW_DAT, etc.) where the floor would be self-referential.
rationale: Regulatory requirement — any study activity performed before informed consent is a serious protocol deviation. Catching pre-consent dates at entry rather than in monitoring saves the deviation report and the corrective-action cycle. The floor is universal across all event dates; the exception for ICF-form dates is structural (the form that captures consent can't be gated on consent already being captured).

flag.message: Field ${field.name} is a clinical-event date — verify: (1) the form has an ICFDAT_CF calculate row at the top (per 7L); (2) the field's constraint extends to include `. >= ${ICFDAT_CF}` AND-joined with existing rules; (3) constraint_message references both the future-date rule and the consent floor.

effect.soft: Append ` and . >= ${ICFDAT_CF}` to the field's existing constraint expression. If no existing constraint, set the constraint to `. <= today() and . >= ${ICFDAT_CF}`. Update constraint_message to: 'Date must be on or after informed consent date and cannot be in the future.' Ensure the form has an ICFDAT_CF helper row at the top per the 7L pattern; if absent, emit it. Constraint-text extension is not yet a DSL primitive — handled here in soft. Per-form ICFDAT_CF helper creation is also soft. Skip on ICF-form fields and on the specific date fields listed in not_in: those would be self-referential.

history.note: Imported from prompts.py RULE OC-7N during Phase B.1c-final. Plan doc had 7N as placeholder; full text pulled from prompts.py lines 392-403. Self-reference exclusion via two layers: field.name not in the ICF date allowlist, and form.form_id not in the ICF/ASSENT forms. The constraint-text extension (append-to-existing) is a real DSL gap; today's effects.set would overwrite, today's effects.ensure would only fire if constraint were empty. A future DSL primitive 'extend_constraint' (read current, AND-join with extension, set result) would make this structured. Composes with 7B (future-date block on start dates) — when both fire, the resulting constraint should be ` . <= today() and . >= ${ICFDAT_CF}`.
